title: ALAMO GROUP INC. DECLARES REGULAR QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
author: Prnewswire
description: Alamo Group Inc. (NYSE:ALG) announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.34 per share, payable on April 29, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 15, 2026. The company manufactures industrial and vegetation management equipment serving infrastructure, construction, and agriculture markets across North America, Europe, Brazil, and Australia.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company's declaration of a regular quarterly dividend demonstrates financial stability and confidence in cash flow generation. Consistent dividend payments are typically viewed positively by investors as they indicate operational strength and management's commitment to returning value to shareholders.

title: ALAMO GROUP INC. DECLARES HIGHER REGULAR QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
author: Prnewswire
description: Alamo Group Inc. (NYSE:ALG) announced a quarterly dividend increase of $0.04 per share to $0.34, representing a 13% increase. The company's Board of Directors declared this raise to reflect its commitment to shareholder value and confidence in future performance. Payment will be made on January 29, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced a significant 13% dividend increase, demonstrating financial strength, confidence in future performance, and commitment to returning value to shareholders. This reflects business resilience and disciplined capital allocation strategy.
